summary: Tested new Tax Returns Archive feature in Admin Dashboard under Operations & Reports. All backend API tests (10) and frontend E2E tests (14) passed. Feature allows uploading, viewing, downloading, and deleting tax return PDFs organized by year.
seed_data_creation: No new seed data created. Tests use year 2097-2098 to avoid conflicts with production data.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Tax Returns Archive feature fully tested: 1) Section visible in Admin Dashboard under Operations & Reports, 2) Year accordions (2025, 2024, 2023, 2022, 2021) expand to show Tax Summary with PDF/CSV download buttons and Filed Tax Return section with upload functionality, 3) Backend endpoints at /api/financials/tax-returns/{year} for CRUD operations, 4) Documents stored in /app/uploads/tax-returns/{year}/ with metadata in MongoDB tax_return_documents collection, 5) All data-testid attributes present: tax-returns-archive-section, tax-returns-archive-title, tax-year-{year}, tax-year-{year}-toggle, upload-button-{year}, upload-input-{year}, tax-returns-list-{year}, no-returns-{year}, tax-return-doc-{id}, download-doc-{id}, delete-doc-{id}.

tax_returns_archive_section_visible.details: Tax Returns Archive section visible in Admin Dashboard under Operations & Reports with title and description

year_accordion_expands.details: Year accordions (2025, 2024, etc.) expand to show Tax Summary and Filed Tax Return sections

upload_tax_return_works.details: Upload button triggers file input, accepts PDF and image files, stores in /app/uploads/tax-returns/{year}/

list_tax_returns_works.details: GET /api/financials/tax-returns/{year} returns documents list with count

download_tax_return_works.details: GET /api/financials/tax-returns/{year}/{doc_id}/download returns file content with correct content-type

delete_tax_return_works.details: DELETE /api/financials/tax-returns/{year}/{doc_id} removes document from filesystem and database

tax_summary_display.details: Tax Summary shows Gross Income and Net Profit with PDF and CSV download buttons

invalid_file_type_rejected.details: Upload rejects non-PDF/image files with 400 error
